title: Ricelash
description: A sweet and chewy festive British dish featuring rice, stir-fried with a dash of sweetness and spices for a perfect accompaniment to any meal.

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Light soy sauce for umami and color

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the rice and sugar until evenly coated.
Heat a little vegetable oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add the rice mixture and stir-fry for about 2 minutes, or until it starts to get golden brown on the edges.
Add onions, carrots, and garlic to the skillet. Cook for another 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally until they are softened.
In a small bowl, mix soy sauce with cornstarch until smooth. Pour this mixture into the skillet and stir well to combine all ingredients thoroughly.
Transfer the cooked rice to an oven-safe dish (like a glass casserole), pour in the soy sauce mixture evenly over it, ensuring that every part of the rice is coated.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes or until the top becomes crispy and golden. Keep an eye on the rice to avoid burning.
Serve hot with a drizzle of extra soy sauce if desired.
